# Pradip Caulagi

> An easy-going, social, and humble engineer and problem solver based in Stockholm, Sweden. Experienced developer and platform engineer specializing in reliability, scalability, and developer experience. CKAD certified with 10+ years of experience in Python, Go, and cloud infrastructure (GCP, AWS, Terraform, Kubernetes).

## Links

- [Blog](https://blog.caulagi.com): Technical blog with articles on software development and platform engineering
- [LinkedIn](https://www.linkedin.com/in/pradipcaulagi): Professional profile and career history
- [GitHub](https://github.com/caulagi): Open source projects and code
- [Mastodon](https://mastodon.social/@caulagi): Social media presence on the Fediverse
